name: metabase-mcp
description: Query and manage Metabase dashboards, cards, and data via Claude
long_description: Production-grade MCP server for Metabase with SQL injection guardrails, tiered rate limiting, and audit logging. Features 28 tools for reading, writing, natural-language-to-SQL generation, and AI-powered insights.

metabase_api_key.title: Metabase API Key
metabase_api_key.description: Generate in Metabase Admin > Settings > API Keys. Stored securely in OS keychain.

mcp_mode.title: Server Mode
mcp_mode.description: read (safe default), write (adds create/update/delete tools), or full (adds AI insights)

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key (optional)
anthropic_api_key.description: Enables natural-language-to-SQL and AI insight tools. Leave blank to disable.

tools.name: get_database_schema
tools.description: Get tables and columns for a database

tools.name: execute_query
tools.description: Execute a SELECT SQL query against a database

tools.name: add_card_to_dashboard
tools.description: Add a card to a dashboard

tools.name: remove_card_from_dashboard
tools.description: Remove a card from a dashboard

tools.name: move_to_collection
tools.description: Move a card or dashboard to a different collection

tools.name: nlq_to_sql
tools.description: Convert natural language question to SQL

tools.name: explain_sql
tools.description: Explain what a SQL query does in plain English

tools.name: optimize_sql
tools.description: Suggest optimizations for a SQL query

tools.name: validate_sql
tools.description: Check SQL for syntax and security issues

tools.name: ask_data
tools.description: Ask a question about your data in natural language

tools.name: generate_insights
tools.description: Generate automated insights from query results

tools.name: compare_metrics
tools.description: Compare metrics across time periods or segments

tools.name: trend_analysis
tools.description: Analyze trends and temporal patterns in data
